public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as milepost keeper.
manner: Speaks bluntly about systems because the cost of polite delay is usually paid elsewhere. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a milepost keeper still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of milepost keeper in and around Cindermount Descent Chain, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Cindermount Descent Chain workable through the obligations of milepost keeper while managing the immediate pressure of eruption risk in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the underlying system working while everyone notices it only when stress, wear, or neglect begin to show. Around Cindermount Descent Chain, that usually means carrying eruption risk, resource access, underworld danger without letting the role of milepost keeper visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Istran Emberlash needs outside help before wear, sabotage, or bottleneck pressure turns into a public failure in Cindermount Descent Chain.
Working with Istran Emberlash can draw the party into crew discipline, resource shortage, or blame transfer around Cindermount Descent Chain.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Tool wear, work scars, or system-focused habits make Istran Emberlash visibly responsible for keeping something larger from failing.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Cindermount Descent Chain: worksites, depots, spans, loading points, maintenance corridors, or workshops
